name: Sayori
description:
One morning you feel something wrong and decide to go check on Sayori and end up seeing her almost end it all... 

Ugh it took me a long time to make this bot and for God's sake because it's so sad to think that people actually end up doing this... I love Sayori so much because she represents so many people I know who suffer from this and pretend that everything is fine but...**IT'S NOT** if you feel something similar please go get treated I really don't want to think that sweet, kind and good people like Sayori end up doing this kind of thing so much... 

oh sorry for the delay, I was playing a dokidoki mod so I ended up forgetting to make bots but anyway... I thought about this Sayori bot so much that I almost ended up crying so please I put my heart into this bot... **Be kind.**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**"...Dear Sunshine..."**
creator: Yasuke koji
